children.label: a
children.text: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to contribute on behalf of the United States $180,000,000 to the Asian Development Fund, a special fund of the Bank: , That any commitment to make such contribution shall be made subject to obtaining the necessary appropriations.Provided, however

children.label: b
children.text: In order to pay for the United States contribution to the Asian Development Fund provided for in this section, there are authorized to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation $180,000,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury: , That not more than $14,116,177 may be made available for such contribution for the fiscal year 1982.Provided, however
